violations.text: Observed allergy statement lacking at self-service units. Allergy statement procedures reviewed. PIC typed up allergy statement during the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with biolfilm dripping into ice. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice during time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

Cooked items in a 'grab and go' case were lacking a list of ingredients and major food allergens. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC placed labels on each individually wrapped item during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

Observed debris around dumpster area. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items, and clean. PIC cleaned around dumpster area during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
Observed allergy statement lacking at self-service units. Allergy statement procedures reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

The following foods were observed out of temperature: 1.Buffalo Crunch rolls were observed held at (127) degrees Fahrenheit. Reheated to proper temp. (208) degrees Fahrenheit. 2.Super slice chix pizza held at (122-127) degrees Fahrenheit. Voluntarily disposed. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Cheese empanadas were observed held at (133) degrees Fahrenheit. Staff reheated empanadas to proper temperature (180) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Cooked items in a 'grab and go' case were lacking a list of ingredients and major food allergens. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

The presence of rodent activity is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in corner of back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment shall clean droppings to monitor if new activity is taking place. Establishment to provided inspector with copy of pest report. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Observed debris around dumpster area. A storage area and enclosure for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items, and clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
Employees were observed putting on gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Baked items in a 'grab and go' case were lacking a list of ingredients and major food allergens. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
A mop was observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
